# Chapter 11: Regulatory and certification failure  (~110 pp)
- 11.1 Regulators and engineering (12) · 11.2 Certification regimes: aviation, medical devices, nuclear, automotive (20) · 11.3 Self-certification and its discontents (15) · 11.4 Regulatory capture (15) · 11.5 Failure section (case): Boeing 737 MAX certification, Therac-25 regulatory aftermath, Volkswagen diesel-emissions defeat device (33) · 11.6 What the engineer owes the regulator and vice versa (15)

**Archetype**: ethics, failure. **Project**: read one accident-investigation report (NTSB, AAIB, BEA, ECSS, or analogous) end to end; produce a one-page critique. **Exercises**: 15.
